title: God the Father Be Our Stay
abc_source:

T: God the Father Be Our Stay
%%combinevoices 1
T: (also known as God the Father With Us Stay or God the Father With Us Be)
C: Words: 15th Century Litany, adapted by Martin Luther, 1524.  Translated by Richard Massie, 1854, alt. 
C: Music: 'Gott Der Vater, Wohn Uns Bei' from Walter's Geistliche Gesangbüchlein, 1524.

metadata.composer: 'Gott Der Vater, Wohn Uns Bei' from Walter's Geistliche Gesangbüchlein, 1524 composite from Landgraf Moritz, 1612 and "Evangelical Lutheran Hymn-Book", 1931
metadata.lyricist: 15th Century Litany, adapted by Martin Luther, 1524.  Translated by Richard Massie, 1854, alt
metadata.copyright: public domain.  This score is a part of the Open Hymnal Project, 2009 Revision.
c_lines: Words: 15th Century Litany, adapted by Martin Luther, 1524.  Translated by Richard Massie, 1854, alt.
Music: 'Gott Der Vater, Wohn Uns Bei' from Walter's Geistliche Gesangbüchlein, 1524.
Setting: composite from Landgraf Moritz, 1612 and "Evangelical Lutheran Hymn-Book", 1931.
copyright: public domain.  This score is a part of the Open Hymnal Project, 2009 Revision.

1.raw_text: God the Father, be our Stay, When hell's dread pow'rs assail us; Cleanse us from our sins, we pray, Nor in our last hour fail us. Keep us from the Evil One; Firm in the faith abiding, In Christ our Savior hiding, And hearti- ly confiding. Let us put God's armor on: With all true Christians running Our heav'nly race and shunning The devil's wiles and cunning. Amen, Amen, this be done, So sing we, Hallelujah!

2.raw_text: Jesus Christ be Thou our Stay, Cleanse us from our sins, we pray, Nor in our last hour fail us. Keep us from the Evil One; Firm in the faith abiding, In Christ our Savior hiding, And hearti- ly confiding. Let us put God's armor on: With all true Christians running Our heav'nly race and shunning The devil's wiles and cunning. Amen, Amen, this be done, So sing we, Hallelujah!

3.raw_text: Holy Ghost, be Thou our Stay, Cleanse us from our sins, we pray, Nor in our last hour fail us. Keep us from the Evil One; Firm in the faith abiding, In Christ our Savior hiding, And hearti- ly confiding. Let us put God's armor on: With all true Christians running Our heav'nly race and shunning The devil's wiles and cunning. Amen, Amen, this be done, So sing we, Hallelujah!

4.raw_text: 1(alt). Triune God, be Thou our Stay, Cleanse us from our sins, we pray, Nor in our last hour fail us. Keep us from the Evil One; Firm in the faith abiding, In Christ our Savior hiding, And hearti- ly confiding. Let us put God's armor on: With all true Christians running Our heav'nly race and shunning The devil's wiles and cunning. Amen, Amen, this be done, So sing we, Hallelujah!
